We are a premier clinic dedicated to providing complete and comprehensive cardiac and medical evaluations. Our clinic is led by highly esteemed professionals, Dr. Vivek G and Dr. Lorraine S Dias, both of whom have studied at KMC Mangalore and Manipal, renowned institutions known for producing some of the best medical experts in the country. With several years of experience in treating a wide range of diseases and managing complex cases, our doctors bring unparalleled expertise and compassion to patient care. Comprehensive Cardiac Care State-of-the-Art Facilities Expert Medical Team Patient-Centered Approach More About Us 0 + Satisfied Clients 0 + Years Experience 0 + Treatments 0 + Success Procedures Unlock the Secrets to Well-being at Heart and Internal Medicine It covers heart disease prevention, blood pressure and cholesterol management, and recognizing early cardiac signs. Additionally, it provides insights into managing diabetes, hypertension, and gastrointestinal disorders through lifestyle modifications and regular health monitoring. What We Offer Your Pathway to Wellness Comprehensive, compassionate care for heart health and internal medicine needs. management of heart diseases. Interventional Cardiology Advanced cardiology procedures and treatments offered.
